name: Home & Maintenance Mode
description: Find Useful Curiosity patterns around cleaning, repair, maintenance, storage, organization, bathroom fixes, kitchen organization, and appliance care.
search_focus: visible home problems with clear before/after payoff

safety_rules.description: Flag electricity, plumbing, chemicals, ladders, blades, heat, pressure, and appliance disassembly.
Analyze the visible format only; do not download or reuse source footage.
High-risk repairs should become warning/checklist content rather than a direct tutorial.

curiosity_score.description: How strongly the before/after or visible problem pulls attention.

usefulness_score.description: How practical the solution is for everyday home maintenance.

originality_potential.description: How easily RAIZ can create a new safe demo using owned footage.

affiliate_potential.description: How naturally tools, cleaners, organizers, or parts can be recommended.

production_difficulty.description: How hard it is to stage the problem, demo the fix, and show a credible result.

rights_risk.description: How likely the format depends on copied footage, exact claims, or creator imitation.

brand_fit.description: How well the idea fits RAIZ practical, useful, non-gross storytelling.

remake_safety.description: How safely the idea can be remade without unsafe instructions or copied assets.
